homeDashboard.layout: centered vertical shell with fixed top-right action icons and menu grid below a large logo and greeting
homeDashboard.greetingBehavior: text updates once per minute based on browser local hour

employeesModule.layout: left sidebar + main workspace + optional right detail panel

employeesModule.headerVisibility: main header and toolbar remain visible because only the card list region scrolls
employeesModule.mobileBreakpointBehavior: below 920px internal overflows are disabled and layout stacks vertically

editSchedule.tables: each table sits inside its own overflow:auto wrapper

employeesFormSelects.theme: dark background, yellow text, yellow border
employeesFormSelects.arrowBehavior: custom ▾ indicator appears only on hover/focus within the wrapper
employeesFormSelects.dateTriples: year/month/day use three separate controls with unit text rendered outside the select box
employeesFormSelects.statusRule: 離職 option is disabled while detailMode is add
employeesFormSelects.phoneCountryControl: text input with datalist rather than select

employeesToolbarAndPopovers.theme: dark/yellow selects and inputs in toolbar composer and popovers

inlineEditConfirmRules: focusout confirms when text is non-empty for title/subtitle/main-note
focusout silently cancels add/edit department when empty
inlineEditCancelRules: empty subtitle on blur cancels edit
empty main-note on confirm removes custom note and falls back to default note
popupInlineEditPatterns.attachmentPattern: selected files enter a pending state and require explicit confirm or cancel before being committed to the draft

stickyActions.homeTopActions: fixed to the top-right of the viewport
stickyActions.employeesMainHeaderAndToolbar: not CSS-sticky, but visually persistent because card list scrolls inside a lower panel
stickyActions.employeesDetailTopActions: remain outside the detail scroll region because the inner detail layout separates action rows from scrollable content

departmentRules: normal departments are draggable and reorderable
retired department is fixed and non-draggable
department delete is blocked if employees still belong to that department
employees.panelCloseRule: dirty add/edit state opens a confirm-close modal before collapsing the detail panel
employees.storageRule: module state persists to localStorage under yiding_employees_module_state_v3_airtable_import

login.storageRule: temporary login writes yd_temp_auth to sessionStorage and clears it on pageshow
